skill.summary: Safety-first Bitcoin and crypto trading on Bitstamp via CLI. Use when the user wants to check crypto prices, view account balance, place buy/sell orders, man...

latestVersion.changelog: Initial release: safety-first Bitstamp trading CLI with CCXT. Dry-run default, kill switch, max order size, daily volume limits, price sanity checks, full audit trail. Supports BTC/USD and ETH/USD.
